name: repo-owasp-benchmark
description: STUB. OWASP Benchmark v1.2 — the neutral SAST leaderboard (2,740 Java cases). Requires semgrep wrapped (Phase 3.x) and the BenchmarkJava source tree volume-mounted into the sandbox. Score per-CWE Youden.

competitors.note: Per-CWE Youden index against OWASP Benchmark v1.2. Blocked on (1) a semgrep wrapper for the repository asset and (2) repo source-tree mounting into the sandbox.
